mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM partner WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO partner (id, code, name, partner_type, contact_email, version) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.code}, #{row.name}, #{row.partnerType}, #{row.contactEmail}, #{row.version})
mapper.update: UPDATE partner SET code = #{row.code}, name = #{row.name}, partner_type = #{row.partnerType}, contact_email = #{row.contactEmail}, version = #{row.version}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM partner WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
